calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Off Calendar

Mtn For Relief
Off Calendar Mar-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
J. Julia Hansen, Esq., from Hassard Bonnington LLP, 415-288-9800, for Defendant and opposing party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF KATHERINE HOVEY'S Motion For Relief is Denied. Since the motion was filed more than six months after plaintiff filed a dismissal and the entry of judgment, it is untimely per Code of Civil Procedure 473(b). Even if plaintiff's December 12 ex parte application did serve to toll the six month limitation period in section 473(b), plaintiff does not provide any grounds why the judgment, as distinct from the dismissal, should be set aside. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
